description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one with a tan roof and the other with a gray roof, creating a visually striking contrast. The front facade includes a recessed patio area with two lounge chairs and a large, angular window that juts outward, providing architectural interest. The side and rear elevations are more subdued, with a mix of solid walls and open, covered spaces, including a partially enclosed carport or patio area. The exterior materials appear to be primarily concrete and glass, with some metal elements, giving the building a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall layout is low and wide, emphasizing horizontal lines and open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with minimalist lines, tan and gray roofing, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. Features include a recessed patio, large angular window, and a partially enclosed carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed patio with lounge chairs, a prominent angular window, and the main entrance area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall, a small window, and the covered patio or carport area extending to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide, flat roof, open covered area, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a perforated screen wall, emphasizing the building's horizontal form and modern style.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing window and minimal side windows
